contaminant.name: Chemical Stains / Acid Etching
contaminant.description: Chemical-stains contamination, it arises from exposure to acids, bases, or solvents, causing discoloration and etching on surfaces. This pattern, it differs from rust or dust by its chemical bonding and uneven penetration, thus resists mechanical wiping. On metals like steel and aluminum, stains embed deeply and corrode, while on plastics such as acrylic and ABS, they cause cracking. Removal challenges include substrate damage risk, so laser cleaning works effectively by vaporizing stains selectively and preserving material integrity.

fireExplosionRisk.description: Minimal fire risk with standard precautions and adequate ventilation
fireExplosionRisk.mitigation: Standard fire safety precautions, extinguisher available within 15m

toxicGasRisk.description: Chlorine generation detected - moderate toxicity risk
toxicGasRisk.mitigation: Half-face or full-face respirator with organic vapor/particulate cartridges, adequate ventilation

visibilityHazard.description: Moderate visibility reduction (40-60%), significant particulate haze
visibilityHazard.mitigation: Ensure clear sight lines, use source extraction, maintain awareness of surroundings

ventilationRequirements.rationale: Standard industrial ventilation (12 ACH) for particulate control
